summary: Tested Reviews API, XP Transactions, Unified Drawer z-index, and Jump In flow integration. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend map interaction testing was limited due to Leaflet marker click detection issues in Playwright.

reviews_api.GET /api/reviews/photographer/{id}: PASS - Returns list of approved reviews
reviews_api.GET /api/reviews/photographer/{id}/stats: PASS - Returns average rating, total reviews, rating breakdown
reviews_api.POST /api/reviews: PASS - Creates review with proper review_type (surfer_to_photographer)
reviews_api.AI Vulgar Word Filter: PASS - Reviews with vulgar words ('shit', 'crap') are flagged as 'pending' status
reviews_api.Duplicate Prevention: PASS - API returns 400 if user tries to review same person twice

xp_transactions.XP Award on Review: PASS - Backend awards 10 XP for review_given (code verified in routes/reviews.py line 187-190)

unified_drawer_code_verification.z-index_1000: PASS - Drawer uses z-[1000] class (UnifiedSpotDrawer.js line 744)
unified_drawer_code_verification.pay-now-btn_testid: PASS - Pay Now button has data-testid='pay-now-btn' (line 615)
unified_drawer_code_verification.jump_in_inside_drawer: PASS - JumpInFlow component is rendered inside drawer (lines 765-771)
unified_drawer_code_verification.photographer_profile_inside_drawer: PASS - PhotographerProfile component is rendered inside drawer (lines 756-761)
unified_drawer_code_verification.drawer_modes: PASS - DRAWER_MODE enum has REPORT, SETUP, JUMP_IN, PHOTOGRAPHER_PROFILE (lines 16-21)
unified_drawer_code_verification.jump_in_button_testid: PASS - Jump In buttons have data-testid='jump-in-btn-{id}' (line 907)

photographer_profile_components.session_pricing: PASS - Shows Buy-in, Per Photo, and Included photos (lines 159-175)
photographer_profile_components.top_reviews: PASS - ReviewsCarousel component shows top reviews (lines 193-205)

critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is correct - Jump In flow and Photographer Profile are inside UnifiedSpotDrawer, not separate modals
z-index is correctly set to 1000 for the drawer
All required data-testid attributes are in place for testing

success_rate.backend: 100% (8 passed, 5 skipped due to test data constraints)
success_rate.frontend: Code verification passed - UI interaction testing limited by Leaflet marker click detection

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews API fully functional with AI vulgar word filtering. UnifiedSpotDrawer code verified - Jump In flow is inside drawer at z-[1000]. Leaflet map markers are created via L.divIcon but are difficult to detect/click in Playwright automation. For manual testing: Login -> Map -> Click spot marker -> Drawer opens -> Click photographer card -> Profile view -> Click Jump In -> Selfie/Payment flow inside same drawer.
